stemHtml: What is the working principle of the TAWS (i.e. receiving its signals)?

options.a: By, among others, using a three dimensional map of the world and the radio altimeter to detect, if any terrain coincides with the flight path.
options.b: It only uses GPS to detect if any terrain coincides with the flight path.
options.c: By using a weather radar which points forward to detect, if any terrain coincides with the flight path.
options.d: By using a special radar which points forward to detect, if any terrain coincides with the flight path.
